meta.title: Hotel & Restaurant Waldschlösschen | Saale-Unstrut
meta.description: Your boutique hotel & restaurant in the heart of the Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park. Fine dining, hospitality and unforgettable moments — near the Arche Nebra.

hero.title: Welcome to
hero.subtitle: Where tradition meets nature — your retreat for fine dining, heartfelt hospitality and unforgettable moments in the heart of the Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park.

welcome.label: Welcome
welcome.title: A place where time
welcome.text1: Located directly at the Arche Nebra and at the foot of the Mittelberg, our Waldschlösschen welcomes you in a uniquely scenic setting in the middle of the Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park. In the venerable administration building of the Kleinwangen potash union — lovingly restored with attention to every detail — you'll find peace, pleasure and heartfelt hospitality.
welcome.text2: Here, where your gaze wanders across lush green meadows and our kitchen team serves culinary poetry, everyday life quickly fades away. In everything we offer our guests, there is not only our high standards but above all a great deal of heart and passion.
welcome.signature: Your Sebastian Sieber & the Waldschlösschen Team

hotel.label: Stay
hotel.title: Hotel
hotel.desc: 24 individually designed rooms where tradition and modern comfort blend harmoniously. Quiet location on the Unstrut cycle path.

restaurant.label: Dine
restaurant.title: Restaurant & Café
restaurant.desc: Regional cuisine with a modern interpretation — seasonal specialities made with the finest ingredients in a unique ambiance.

weddings.label: Celebrate
weddings.title: Weddings & Events
weddings.desc: The most beautiful day of your life deserves a special setting. Unforgettable celebrations in historic ambiance.

family.label: Gather
family.title: Family Celebrations
family.desc: Spend unforgettable hours with your loved ones — in a warm, hospitable atmosphere.

spaces.label: Our Spaces
spaces.title: Character in every
spaces.text: Every room at Waldschlösschen tells its own story. Lovingly restored, our spaces combine the charm of the past with the comfort of the present.

culinary.label: Culinary
culinary.title: Where pleasure
culinary.text1: Our kitchen pampers you with seasonal specialities from the region. We rely on the finest ingredients and honest, loving preparation — traditional recipes with a modern interpretation. Enjoy exquisite wines from the Saale-Unstrut growing region.
culinary.text2: Whether an aperitif by the fireplace, dinner by candlelight or a relaxed afternoon in the summer garden — you can expect a feast for all the senses.

events.label: Celebrate with Character
events.title: Your special occasion,
events.text: Whether wedding, anniversary, corporate event or family celebration — at Waldschlösschen every occasion becomes an unforgettable experience in a distinctive setting.

weddings.title: Weddings
weddings.desc: The most beautiful day of your life deserves an extraordinary setting. From the ceremony to the celebration — we accompany you with heart and experience, creating unforgettable moments for you and your guests.

family.title: Family Celebrations
family.desc: Birthdays, christenings, communion or simply a special evening with family. Our lovingly designed rooms provide the perfect setting for joyful hours together.

meetings.title: Meetings & Seminars
meetings.desc: Creative ideas need inspiring places. Our event room accommodates up to 40 people — equipped with modern technology amidst historic atmosphere.

arrangements.title: Arrangements
arrangements.desc: Discover our carefully curated experience packages: Romantic Time for Two, cultural discoveries at Arche Nebra or indulgent days with half board and regional wine.

voucher.label: Gift Vouchers
voucher.title: Give the gift of
voucher.text1: Surprise your loved ones with a voucher for unforgettable hours at Waldschlösschen. Whether a gourmet dinner, a romantic overnight stay or a complete weekend arrangement — give the gift of relaxation and pleasure in a unique setting.
voucher.text2: Our vouchers are individually customizable and the perfect gift for any occasion. Contact us — we're happy to advise you.

destinations.label: Explore the Region
destinations.title: Destinations in the
destinations.text: Waldschlösschen is the ideal starting point for discoveries in the fascinating Saale-Unstrut region — one of the northernmost wine regions in Europe with rich history and breathtaking nature.

cta.label: We look forward to welcoming you
cta.title: Your stay at
cta.text: Book your room, reserve a table or plan your celebration with us. We're happy to advise you personally and make your stay something truly special.

footer.tagline: Your boutique hotel & restaurant in the Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park. Fine dining, hospitality and unforgettable moments — near the Arche Nebra.

meta.title: Hotel Waldschlösschen Nebra – Rooms & Accommodation | Saale-Unstrut
meta.description: Stay at Hotel Waldschlösschen in Nebra: 24 comfortable double rooms in a heritage-listed building, nestled in the Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park. Right next to the Arche Nebra.

hero.title: Where tradition meets
hero.subtitle: 24 individually designed rooms in a heritage-listed 19th century building — your retreat in the heart of the Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park.

intro.label: Our Hotel
intro.title: Arrive and
intro.text1: The impressive 19th century building sits idyllically between the gentle hills of the Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park, on the banks of the Unstrut and just a short walk from the Arche Nebra. Once the administration building of the Kleinwangen potash union, the house has been lovingly restored to combine its heritage-protected shell with every modern comfort.
intro.text2: Here, where your gaze wanders across lush green meadows and fresh air lulls you into a deep sleep, you'll find the distance from everyday life you need. Throughout your stay, you'll experience the magic of a unique atmosphere and private hospitality — because in everything we do, alongside our highest standards, there is above all a great deal of heart.

rooms.label: Our Rooms
rooms.title: Romantic, cosy,
rooms.text: Each of our 24 double rooms has its own character. With romantic, cosy furnishings, tradition and modernity blend into a harmonious whole — a place to feel at home, to arrive and to linger.
rooms.singleDesc: Comfortable room for solo travellers with full amenities.
rooms.doubleDesc: Spacious room for two with romantic furnishings.
rooms.priceNote: All prices per room per night, including a generous breakfast buffet and a bottle of mineral water in the room on arrival day.

amenities.label: Room Amenities
amenities.title: Comfort in every
amenities.text: Our rooms are exclusively non-smoking and offer everything you need for a restful stay.

breakfast.label: Breakfast
breakfast.title: The perfect start
breakfast.text: Start every morning with our generous breakfast buffet. Fresh regional produce, homemade spreads, crusty bread and aromatic coffee — everything your heart desires to begin a day full of discoveries.

location.label: Location & Surroundings
location.title: The ideal
location.text: Located directly on the Unstrut cycle path and just a short walk from the Arche Nebra, our hotel is the perfect base for exploring the fascinating Saale-Unstrut region — whether by bike, on foot or on a trip to vineyards and cultural sites.
location.radweg: Directly on the Unstrut cycle path

cta.label: Your Stay
cta.title: Ready for your
cta.text: Book your room at Waldschlösschen now and experience hospitality that comes from the heart. We look forward to welcoming you!

meta.title: Restaurant Waldschlösschen Nebra – Regional Cuisine | Saale-Unstrut
meta.description: Restaurant Waldschlösschen in Nebra: Regional, seasonal cuisine in the stylish ambiance of a heritage-listed building. Fireplace room, summer terrace & beer garden in the Saale-Unstrut nature park.

hero.title: Where pleasure
hero.subtitle: Seasonal specialities from the region, served in a unique setting — in our stylish dining room, by the crackling fireplace or on our sunny terrace.

intro.label: Our Philosophy
intro.title: Culinary poetry,
intro.text1: Our kitchen at Restaurant Waldschlösschen pampers you with seasonal specialities — after an excursion to the Arche Nebra, for a romantic dinner or simply because you want to treat yourself. In the spirit of fine taste, we rely on the best ingredients from the region.
intro.text2: Enjoy the atmosphere with a prior aperitif by the fireplace or let our sunny terrace invite you to linger, dream and savour in summer. A warm, hospitable atmosphere and stylish ambiance welcome you.
intro.text3: Here, where your gaze wanders across lush green meadows and the idyllic Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park, where our kitchen team serves culinary poetry — here, everyday life is quickly forgotten.

cuisine.label: Our Cuisine
cuisine.title: Tradition meets
cuisine.text: Regional classics, reinterpreted and prepared with love. Our menu changes with the seasons — fresh, honest and always with that special touch.

seasonal.title: Seasonal
seasonal.desc: Our menu changes with the seasons. Fresh, seasonal ingredients form the foundation of every dish.

regional.title: Regional
regional.desc: We source our products from local producers, supporting the diversity of the Saale-Unstrut region.

homemade.title: Made with Love
homemade.desc: Every dish is freshly prepared in our kitchen with care and passion — craftsmanship, not mass production.

wine.title: Saale-Unstrut Wines
wine.desc: Accompany your meal with exquisite wines from Germany's northernmost quality wine-growing region.

spaces.label: Our Spaces
spaces.title: Dining in a special
spaces.text: Whether stylish dining room, cosy fireplace room or sunny terrace — we have the right setting for every occasion.

restaurant.title: The Dining Room
restaurant.desc: Our main restaurant welcomes you with stylishly restored ambiance and loving details. Here, history and pleasure combine.

kamin.title: The Fireplace Room
kamin.desc: The perfect place for an aperitif or an intimate dinner. Exquisite wines by the crackling fireplace — pure pleasure.

terrasse.title: Summer Terrace & Beer Garden
terrasse.desc: In fine weather, enjoy views across the nature park from our terrace. Relaxation under the open sky.

hours.label: Opening Hours
hours.title: We are open
hours.text: Whether a spontaneous lunch visit or a planned dinner — we look forward to seeing you. Reservations are recommended, especially at weekends.
hours.closed: Dec 24 (Christmas Eve) closed · Events by arrangement
hours.note: For events of any kind, arrangements outside regular opening hours are also possible.

events.label: Special Occasions
events.title: Pleasure for every
events.text: Our restaurant provides the ideal setting for special evenings — whether a private dinner, wine tasting or candlelight menu.

private.title: Private Dinner
private.desc: Celebrate in an intimate setting in one of our charming private rooms. We'll create a bespoke menu to your wishes.

candle.title: Candlelight Menu
candle.desc: Romantic hours by candlelight with an exclusive multi-course menu — the perfect evening for lovers.

wine.title: Wine Tasting
wine.desc: Discover the variety of Saale-Unstrut wines at a guided tasting right in our house.

cta.label: We look forward to welcoming you
cta.title: Your table at
cta.text: Reserve your table now and enjoy regional specialities in a unique setting. We're happy to advise you personally.

meta.title: Celebrations & Events at Waldschlösschen Nebra – Weddings, Family Events, Conferences | Saale-Unstrut
meta.description: Celebrate weddings, family events and conferences at Waldschlösschen Nebra. Registry office on-site, up to 50 guests, historic setting in the Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park.

hero.title: Special occasions,
hero.subtitle: Weddings, family celebrations and events in a historic setting — with a registry office on-site, regional cuisine and heartfelt hospitality.

intro.label: Celebrate with Character
intro.title: A special celebration deserves
intro.text1: Over more than 80 years, Waldschlösschen has hosted countless celebrations — weddings, birthdays, confirmations and anniversaries. Let yourself be enchanted by the stunning scenery and classic flair of our heritage-listed house.
intro.text2: With lovingly restored rooms for different group sizes, our own registry office, in-house kitchen with regional specialities and 24 rooms for your guests, we offer everything under one roof. Because in everything we do, alongside expertise, there is above all a great deal of heart.

weddings.label: Weddings
weddings.title: Say 'I do' —
weddings.text: The most beautiful day of your life deserves an extraordinary setting. Unforgettable moments in historic ambiance, with personal support from the first conversation to the last dance.
weddings.registryDesc: Since March 2017, a branch of the registry office of the Unstrut-Tal municipal association has been set up in the Waldschlösschen atrium. Marry in a unique setting — ceremony and celebration under one roof.
weddings.registryNote: Ceremony room on the 1st floor, seats 14 + bridal couple. Contact: Registry Office Freyburg, Ms Böttcher, Tel: 03 44 64 / 30 03 4
weddings.celebrationDesc: Whether a large gathering or an intimate family circle — we have the right ambiance for you. Our experienced team accompanies you in planning and ensures your day is perfect.

family.title: Family Celebrations
family.desc: Whether birthday, christening, confirmation or anniversary — family is the anchor in the river of time. Celebrate special moments in a warm, hospitable setting.

meetings.title: Conferences & Seminars
meetings.desc: Creative ideas need inspiring places. Our conference room seats up to 40 with projector, screen, flipchart and Wi-Fi.

celebrations.title: Corporate Events
celebrations.desc: Team building, summer party or Christmas celebration — with terrace, beer garden and regional cuisine, we'll create your corporate event.

spaces.label: Our Venues
spaces.title: Space for your
spaces.text: From the magnificent atrium to the cosy Schachtstube — our historic rooms provide the ideal setting for every occasion.

contact.title: Contact
contact.desc: Call us or write to us. We'll discuss your wishes and ideas.

visit.title: Visit
visit.desc: Visit us and be convinced by our spaces and atmosphere.

plan.title: Planning
plan.desc: Together we create your individual concept — menu, decoration, schedule and details.

celebrate.title: Celebrate
celebrate.desc: Enjoy your special day. We take care of everything — you take care of your guests.

cta.label: Let us plan your celebration
cta.title: Ready for your
cta.text: Contact us for a no-obligation consultation. We'll be happy to create a bespoke offer — tailored to your wishes.

meta.title: Destinations near Hotel Waldschlösschen Nebra – Arche Nebra, Vineyards, Cycling | Saale-Unstrut
meta.description: Discover destinations near Hotel Waldschlösschen in Nebra: Arche Nebra, Sky Disc, Saale-Unstrut vineyards, Unstrut cycle path, Memleben Monastery and more in the Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park.

hero.title: A region full of
hero.subtitle: Archaeological treasures, picturesque vineyards, historic monasteries and extensive cycling paths — the Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park right on our doorstep.

intro.label: The Region
intro.title: Saale-Unstrut —
intro.text1: Waldschlösschen is located in the heart of one of Germany's most fascinating cultural landscapes. The Saale-Unstrut-Triasland nature park captivates with meadow orchards, forests, castles, the river landscapes of the Saale and Unstrut and Europe's northernmost quality wine region.
intro.text2: Whether cultural-historical discoveries, cycling tours along idyllic rivers, wine tastings in historic cellars or simply enjoying the silence of nature — here you'll find relaxation and inspiration in equal measure.

stats.cycling: directly on the Unstrut cycle path

arche.title: Arche Nebra
arche.desc: The museum dedicated to the world-famous Nebra Sky Disc — one of Europe's most significant archaeological finds. With planetarium and exhibitions on the astronomical significance of the Mittelberg. Right on our doorstep.

mittelberg.distance: At the foot of the hotel
mittelberg.title: Mittelberg & Sky Eye
mittelberg.desc: Discovery site of the Sky Disc with the 30m high observation tower tilted at 10 degrees. At the top, the Sky Eye awaits — and breathtaking views across the region.

weinberge.title: Saale-Unstrut Vineyards
weinberge.desc: Germany's northernmost quality wine region impresses with steep terraces, centuries-old dry stone walls and romantic vineyard cottages. Over 60 wineries invite you to taste.

rotkaeppchen.title: Rotkäppchen Sparkling Wine Cellar
rotkaeppchen.desc: Visit the famous sparkling wine cellar in Freyburg — open 365 days a year. Tours through historic cellars and tastings of fine vintages.

memleben.title: Memleben Monastery & Imperial Palace
memleben.desc: Historic monastery complex of outstanding significance — the place where Emperors Henry I and Otto I passed away. A place that breathes history.

naumburg.title: Naumburg Cathedral (UNESCO)
naumburg.desc: Naumburg Cathedral with its famous donor figures Uta and Ekkehard is a UNESCO World Heritage Site and one of the most significant cultural monuments of the Middle Ages.

eisleben.title: Lutherstadt Eisleben (UNESCO)
eisleben.desc: Martin Luther's birthplace and place of death. The Luther memorial sites are a UNESCO World Heritage Site of outstanding historical significance.

freibad.title: Nebra Terrace Swimming Pool
freibad.desc: An absolute crowd-puller in summer: the 35,000 m² leisure complex with terrace pool — perfect for families with children.

burgscheidungen.title: Burgscheidungen Castle
burgscheidungen.desc: Imposing baroque castle high above the Unstrut valley with extensive parkland and views across the region's vineyards.

active.label: Active in the Region
active.title: Experience nature,
active.text: Waldschlösschen is the ideal starting point for active relaxation. Located directly on the Unstrut cycle path, with free bicycle rental and hiking trails at the door.

radfahren.title: Cycling
radfahren.desc: The Unstrut cycle path (189 km) and the Sky Disc cycle path (71 km) run directly past the hotel. Plus the popular 26 km circular tour Nebra–Ziegelroda Forest–Pretitz with wonderful views.

wandern.title: Hiking
wandern.desc: The long-distance Feengrotten-Kyffhäuser Trail (230 km) passes through Nebra. The Trias Gate, the Unstrut's breakthrough, is the starting point of a 32 km circular trail through rugged landscape.

wein.title: Wine Enjoyment
wein.desc: Discover the Saale-Unstrut wine region with steep terraces, dry stone walls and over 60 wineries. Wine tastings, cellar tours and the Rotkäppchen sparkling wine cellar in Freyburg await.

active.bikeNote: Free bicycle rental at the hotel

region.label: The Region in Numbers
region.title: Saale-Unstrut-Triasland —
region.titleEmphasis: a nature park full of variety
region.text: The Saale-Unstrut quality wine-growing area is distinguished by its vineyards with steep terraces, centuries-old dry stone walls and romantic vineyard cottages. Nestled between castles, monasteries and idyllic river valleys, the region is an insider tip for connoisseurs, culture lovers and nature enthusiasts.

stats.vineyards: vineyard area in the wine region
stats.cycling: length of the Unstrut cycle path

cta.label: Your starting point for discoveries
cta.title: Ready for your
cta.text: Book your room at Waldschlösschen and experience the fascinating Saale-Unstrut region. We're happy to advise on excursions, cycling tours and arrangements.

meta.title: Contact & Directions – Hotel & Restaurant Waldschlösschen Nebra | Saale-Unstrut
meta.description: Contact, opening hours and directions to Hotel & Restaurant Waldschlösschen in Nebra. Phone, email, contact form and directions by car, bus, train and bicycle.

hero.title: Get in
hero.subtitle: We look forward to hearing from you — whether room reservation, table booking, event enquiry or just a question. We're happy to help.

hours.label: Opening Hours
hours.title: When you can
hours.breakfastNote: Breakfast: Mon–Fri 7:00–10:00 AM · Sat–Sun 8:00–10:00 AM. Included in room rate.

form.label: Contact Form
form.title: Write to
form.text: We will process your enquiry as soon as possible and usually get back to you within 24 hours.
form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent.

car.title: By Car
car.desc: A38, Querfurt exit → direction Nebra → in Nebra follow signs to Kleinwangen (2 km). A71 also nearby. Free parking for cars and coaches directly at the house.

bus.title: By Bus
bus.desc: Bus stop 'Großwangen, Parkplatz Himmelsscheibe' directly in front of the house. Regular connections from Nebra and the region.

train.title: By Train
train.desc: Wangen station just 400 m away (approx. 5 min walk). Follow signs to 'Waldschlösschen'. Erfurt-Weimar Airport: approx. 72 km.

bike.title: By Bicycle
bike.desc: Located directly on the Unstrut cycle path (189 km) and Sky Disc cycle path (71 km). Free bicycle rental at the hotel for guests.

cta.label: We look forward to welcoming you
cta.title: Any questions?
cta.text: Our team is happy to advise you personally — whether room booking, table reservation, event planning or excursion tips. We're here for you.
